MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Feder, Esq. 415-392-4476 for Plaintiff.
Jennifer Terry, Esq. 213-629-7415 and Steve Chariyasatit, Esq. 415-757-5500 of Arent Fox for Defendants.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court raises the issue of conflicting narratives and how the jury needs to decide. Defendant argues "not sexual in nature", Plaintiff waited for 4 years and failure in the interactive process(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript).The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
